The game runs on an original Pac-Man board with the Ms. Pac-Man daughterboard installed. Details: Fully playable Ms. Pac-Man Original CRT monitor (picture looks good for its age) Classic joystick + buttons Cabinet is solid with normal wear from age Side art present (shows some wear, see photos) Original wiring and internal components largely intact Includes original-style operator settings card inside Condition: Works and plays Some cosmetic wear consistent with age (scratches, fading, etc.) Not fully restored – great candidate for restoration or to enjoy as-is Notes for collectors: This is a Pac-Man to Ms. Pac-Man conversion, not a factory-dedicated Ms. Pac-Man cabinet. These were widely used in arcades in the early 1980s and are part of authentic arcade history. Pickup only – located in New Hope AL. Bring help, this is heavy.
